headline: Put $5,000 In These Dividend Giants and Earn Passive Income Every Quarter
summary: Earned income has a ceiling. Passive income from dividend stocks operates differently: cash flows in whether markets are up or down, whether you’re working or sleeping. With core inflation still grinding higher, the Core PCE index at 128.86 as of February 2026, and the 10-year Treasury yielding 4.32%, income investors need yield that keeps pace ... headline: This Biotech Stock Soars on Hair Loss Trial Results. It Isn’t a Cure for Baldness.
summary: Shares of  Nektar Therapeutics  rose sharply Monday after the company released results from a late-stage trial for the treatment of alopecia areata, a chronic autoimmune disease causing hair loss.  In the yearlong Phase 2b study, nearly 40% of patients who received Nektar’s treatment, rezpegaldesleukin, showed a 50% or better improvement in their severity of alopecia score, compared to 13.6% of placebo patients.  Mild-to-moderate injection site reactions were the most common side effect, but nearly all of these reactions resolved themselves within five days.

headline: Eli Lilly Snags $7 Billion Cancer Deal To Rival Gilead, J&J, Others

headline: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire cancer drug maker Kelonia in deal worth up to $7 billion
